columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the event was recorded

columns.name: CampaignId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the campaign, generated by Microsoft Defender for Office 365

columns.name: CampaignType
columns.description: Category of the campaign, like Phish, Malware, Spam, and others

columns.name: CampaignSubtype
columns.description: Contains more details about the campaign, like the brand being phished or related malware campaigns, if available

columns.name: NetworkMessageId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the email, generated by Microsoft  Defender for Office 365

columns.name: RecipientEmailAddress
columns.description: Email address of the recipient, or email address of the recipient after distribution list expansion
